Inquiry.title: Inquiry
Inquiry.description: A form inquiry from a potential client.

fullName.description: The full name of the inquirer.

email.description: The email address of the inquirer.

visaType.description: The type of visa they are interested in.

status.description: The current status of the inquiry.

Asset.title: Asset
Asset.description: Metadata for uploaded assets like logos and background images.

updatedAt.description: When the asset was last updated.

Username.title: Username
Username.description: A mapping of a unique username to an email address.

email.description: The email address associated with this username.

uid.description: The Firebase Auth UID associated with this username.

/assets/{assetId}.description: Collection of site assets like logos and background images.

/usernames/{username}.description: Mapping of usernames to email addresses for login.
